summary: iter223 — Quiz Challenge minimal additions tested. Backend: scheduler imports + 3/3 pytests PASS, pool=253 (>=30), constants 30/100/48 OK. Frontend: DefyChampionModal opens, free mode hides slider, paid mode shows stake XAF + USD equivalent (~1.79 USD for 1002 XAF, debounced 400ms via /api/payments/hubtel/exchange-rate), commission 15% within 0-50 clamp, free regression OK (modal closed + nav after submit). validateAmount returns correct errors for negative/too_high/valid amounts.
critical_code_review_comments: DefyChampionModal initial cfg.paid_enabled=false; relies on /api/games/toggles fetch to enable paid button. If fetch fails silently (catch{}) the paid mode stays disabled — acceptable graceful degradation but consider adding a loading skeleton or retry button.
Toggles fetch debounce: when modal opens fast and user clicks paid mode immediately, button appears disabled (~1-2s). Minor UX nit only.
WS.validateAmount in submit() correctly clamps but slider HTML min/max already prevents invalid values — defense-in-depth pattern is good (catches state hacks).
Pool refresh tick uses event_loop.time() (monotonic) — correct for debounce. Single-flight guard `_emergency_in_flight` prevents double generation. LGTM.
